# Whyzer.ai

Whyzer is an AI-powered Point of View (POV) platform for enterprise B2B sellers.

## What Whyzer Does
Whyzer transforms SEC filings, earnings call transcripts, investor letters, and financial data into boardroom-ready Points of View — helping AEs speak to executive priorities instead of product features.

## Key Features
- AI-generated Master Dossier for any publicly traded company
- Financial KPI extraction from 10-K and 10-Q filings
- 3-5 executive-ready Points of View per account
- C-suite and board member executive quote extraction
- AI-generated podcast summaries of earnings calls

## Pricing
- Premium Monthly: $57/month
- Elite Monthly: $97/month
- Elite Annual: $997/year
- Free tier: Full access for 3 accounts, no credit card required

## Founded by
Jamal Reimer — Top 0.1% Oracle seller globally, $160M+ SaaS closed, President's Club multiple years.
